homepage.heroSubline: Protecting your home with top-quality siding solutions. Decades of experience tackling Oklahoma's toughest weather.
aboutText: Old Town Siding Co. was founded right here in Tulsa over a decade ago with a commitment to providing durable and beautiful siding solutions for our neighbors. We saw a need for reliable contractors who understood the unique challenges of Oklahoma's climate, and we've been exceeding expectations ever since.

We believe in doing things the right way, every time. That means using only the highest-quality materials, employing skilled and experienced installers, and standing behind our work with unwavering integrity. From initial consultation to final inspection, you can count on us for clear communication and exceptional service.

Tulsa is our home, and we're proud to contribute to its vibrant community. We actively support local initiatives and strive to be a responsible and ethical business. When you choose Old Town Siding Co., you're not just getting a great siding job – you're supporting a local business that cares.

valueProps.title: Guaranteed Satisfaction

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free, no-obligation quote for your siding project. Call now!

services.name: Vinyl Siding Installation
services.shortDescription: Durable and affordable vinyl siding installation for Tulsa homes.
services.description:
Vinyl siding remains a popular choice for Tulsa homeowners due to its affordability, durability, and low maintenance requirements. Old Town Siding Co. offers a wide variety of vinyl siding styles and colors to complement any architectural design, from classic ranch homes in midtown to newer builds in the suburbs. We understand the importance of proper installation to ensure long-lasting performance, especially in Oklahoma's climate. Our team meticulously installs each panel, paying close attention to detail to prevent moisture intrusion and maintain a seamless appearance.

We use only premium-grade vinyl siding products designed to withstand the harsh Oklahoma sun, strong winds, and occasional hail. Our experienced installers are trained to handle any challenges, including uneven walls and complex architectural features. We also ensure proper ventilation behind the siding to prevent mold and mildew growth, contributing to a healthier and more comfortable home.

With Old Town Siding Co., you can expect a hassle-free experience from start to finish. We'll work closely with you to select the perfect vinyl siding option for your home and budget, and our skilled team will complete the installation efficiently and professionally. Enjoy the peace of mind that comes with knowing your home is protected by a durable and attractive vinyl siding system.
process: Step 1: Consultation and Estimate: We'll assess your needs and provide a detailed, transparent estimate.
Step 2: Material Selection: Choose from a wide range of vinyl siding styles and colors.
Step 3: Professional Installation: Our experienced team will install your siding with precision and care.
Step 4: Final Inspection: We'll ensure your complete satisfaction with the finished product.
benefits: Wide variety of styles and colors

faq.question: How long does vinyl siding last?
faq.answer: With proper installation and maintenance, vinyl siding can last for 20-40 years or more.

faq.question: Is vinyl siding energy efficient?
faq.answer: Vinyl siding can improve your home's energy efficiency by providing an extra layer of insulation. We also offer insulated vinyl siding options for enhanced performance.

faq.question: How do I clean vinyl siding?
faq.answer: Vinyl siding can be easily cleaned with soap and water or a pressure washer on a low setting.

services.name: Fiber Cement Siding Installation
services.shortDescription: Durable and beautiful fiber cement siding for Tulsa's discerning homeowners.
services.description:
Fiber cement siding is a premium siding option known for its exceptional durability, fire resistance, and aesthetic appeal. Old Town Siding Co. specializes in the professional installation of fiber cement siding for Tulsa homes that demand the best. Fiber cement siding mimics the look of natural wood but resists rot, insects, and fire, making it an ideal choice for Oklahoma's climate. We expertly install fiber cement siding on a variety of home styles, from historic homes in Brookside to modern residences in Jenks.

Our team is highly trained in the proper techniques for installing fiber cement siding, ensuring a flawless and long-lasting finish. We pay meticulous attention to detail, including proper sealing and flashing, to prevent moisture intrusion and protect your home from the elements. We understand the importance of using the right tools and materials to achieve optimal results.

Old Town Siding Co. offers a wide range of fiber cement siding styles and colors to suit your taste and budget. Whether you're looking for a classic clapboard look or a more contemporary design, we can help you find the perfect fiber cement siding solution for your home. Enjoy the beauty and durability of fiber cement siding with professional installation from Old Town Siding Co.
process: Step 1: Consultation and Design: We'll discuss your aesthetic preferences and provide expert design advice.
Step 2: Precise Measurement and Cutting: We ensure accurate cuts for a seamless and professional finish.
Step 3: Expert Installation: Our skilled team will install your fiber cement siding with precision and care.
Step 4: Painting and Finishing: We'll paint or stain your siding to your exact specifications.

faq.question: How long does fiber cement siding last?
faq.answer: Fiber cement siding can last for 50 years or more with proper installation and maintenance.

faq.question: Is fiber cement siding expensive?
faq.answer: Fiber cement siding is a premium siding option and typically costs more than vinyl siding. However, its long lifespan and durability make it a worthwhile investment.

faq.question: Does fiber cement siding need to be painted?
faq.answer: Yes, fiber cement siding needs to be painted or stained to protect it from the elements and maintain its appearance. We offer professional painting services to ensure a long-lasting finish.

services.name: Siding Repair Services
services.shortDescription: Fast and reliable siding repair services to protect your Tulsa home.
services.description:
Oklahoma weather can be brutal on siding. Hail, wind, and extreme temperature fluctuations can cause cracks, dents, and loose panels. Old Town Siding Co. provides comprehensive siding repair services to address any damage and restore your home's protection and curb appeal. We handle all types of siding repairs, from minor patching to complete panel replacements.

Our experienced technicians are equipped to assess the damage and provide cost-effective repair solutions. We understand the importance of timely repairs to prevent further damage and maintain the integrity of your siding system. We work with all types of siding materials, including vinyl, fiber cement, and wood.

Don't let damaged siding compromise your home's protection and value. Contact Old Town Siding Co. for prompt and reliable siding repair services. We'll get your siding back in top condition quickly and efficiently.
process: Step 1: Damage Assessment: We'll thoroughly inspect your siding to identify the extent of the damage.
Step 2: Repair Plan: We'll develop a customized repair plan to address the specific issues.
Step 3: Expert Repair: Our skilled technicians will perform the necessary repairs with precision and care.
Step 4: Quality Assurance: We'll ensure the repairs are completed to the highest standards.
benefits: Protects your home from the elements
Extends the lifespan of your siding

faq.question: How do I know if my siding needs repair?
faq.answer: Look for signs of damage such as cracks, dents, loose panels, or discoloration.

faq.question: Can I repair siding myself?
faq.answer: While some minor repairs can be done DIY, it's best to hire a professional for significant damage to ensure proper repair and prevent further issues.

faq.question: How much does siding repair cost?
faq.answer: The cost of siding repair depends on the extent of the damage and the type of siding material. We offer free estimates to provide you with a clear understanding of the costs involved.

services.name: Siding Replacement
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your Tulsa home with new, high-quality siding.
services.description:
When siding is beyond repair or simply outdated, Old Town Siding Co. offers complete siding replacement services to transform your home's appearance and protection. We'll remove your old siding and install new, high-quality siding that enhances your home's curb appeal and provides lasting protection from the elements. We offer a wide selection of siding materials, styles, and colors to suit any taste and budget.

Our experienced team will handle every aspect of the siding replacement process, from removing the old siding to installing new flashing and trim. We pay close attention to detail to ensure a flawless and long-lasting finish. We also dispose of the old siding responsibly.

Investing in new siding can significantly improve your home's value, energy efficiency, and curb appeal. Contact Old Town Siding Co. for a free consultation and let us help you choose the perfect siding replacement solution for your Tulsa home.
process: Step 1: Consultation and Design: We'll discuss your goals and help you choose the right siding for your home.
Step 2: Removal of Old Siding: We'll safely and efficiently remove your existing siding.
Step 3: Installation of New Siding: Our skilled team will install your new siding with precision and care.
Step 4: Cleanup and Inspection: We'll clean up the job site and ensure your complete satisfaction.

faq.question: How long does siding replacement take?
faq.answer: The duration of siding replacement depends on the size of your home and the complexity of the project. We'll provide you with an estimated timeline during the consultation.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for siding replacement?
faq.answer: In some cases, a permit may be required for siding replacement. We'll handle the permit process for you.

faq.question: What is the best time of year for siding replacement?
faq.answer: Siding replacement can be done at any time of year, but the ideal time is during the spring or fall when the weather is mild.

services.name: Soffit and Fascia Repair & Installation
services.shortDescription: Protect your roof and home with expert soffit and fascia services.
services.description:
Soffit and fascia play a crucial role in protecting your roof and home from moisture, pests, and the elements. Old Town Siding Co. provides expert soffit and fascia repair and installation services to ensure your home is properly protected. We handle all types of soffit and fascia materials, including wood, vinyl, and aluminum.

Damaged or missing soffit and fascia can lead to serious problems, such as water damage, mold growth, and pest infestations. Our experienced technicians can quickly assess the damage and provide effective repair solutions. We also offer complete soffit and fascia replacement services to upgrade your home's protection and appearance.

Properly installed and maintained soffit and fascia are essential for the long-term health of your roof and home. Contact Old Town Siding Co. for reliable soffit and fascia services you can trust.
process: Step 1: Inspection and Assessment: We'll inspect your soffit and fascia to identify any damage or deterioration.
Step 2: Repair or Replacement: We'll recommend the best course of action based on the condition of your soffit and fascia.
Step 3: Professional Installation: Our skilled team will install or repair your soffit and fascia with precision and care.
Step 4: Quality Assurance: We'll ensure the work is completed to the highest standards and provides lasting protection.
benefits: Protects your roof from moisture and pests
Extends the lifespan of your roof

faq.question: What are soffit and fascia?
faq.answer: Soffit is the material that covers the underside of your roof overhang, while fascia is the vertical board that runs along the edge of your roof.

faq.question: How do I know if my soffit and fascia need repair?
faq.answer: Look for signs of damage such as rot, cracks, peeling paint, or pest infestations.

faq.question: What are the benefits of proper soffit and fascia?
faq.answer: Properly installed and maintained soffit and fascia protect your roof from moisture and pests, improve ventilation, and enhance your home's curb appeal.

services.name: Trim Installation and Repair
services.shortDescription: Providing professional trim installation and repair services in Tulsa.
services.description:
Old Town Siding Co. offers comprehensive trim installation and repair services to enhance the beauty and protection of your home. Trim adds a finishing touch to your siding and protects vulnerable areas from the elements. Our experienced team can install or repair all types of trim, including window trim, door trim, corner trim, and more.

We use high-quality materials and precise installation techniques to ensure a seamless and long-lasting finish. Whether you're looking to upgrade your existing trim or repair damaged trim, Old Town Siding Co. has you covered.

We pay attention to every detail to ensure your trim complements your siding and enhances your home's overall aesthetic appeal. We also offer custom trim solutions to meet your specific needs and preferences.
process: Step 1: Consultation and Design: We'll discuss your design preferences and help you choose the right trim for your home.
Step 2: Precise Measurement and Cutting: We ensure accurate cuts for a seamless and professional finish.
Step 3: Expert Installation: Our skilled team will install your trim with precision and care.
Step 4: Painting and Finishing: We'll paint or stain your trim to your exact specifications.
benefits: Protects vulnerable areas from the elements
Adds a finishing touch to your siding

faq.question: What types of trim do you install?
faq.answer: We install all types of trim, including window trim, door trim, corner trim, and more.

faq.question: What materials do you use for trim?
faq.answer: We use high-quality materials such as wood, vinyl, and composite trim.

faq.question: How much does trim installation cost?
faq.answer: The cost of trim installation depends on the type of trim, the size of your home, and the complexity of the project. We offer free estimates to provide you with a clear understanding of the costs involved.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Old Town Siding Co. did an incredible job on our vinyl siding installation! The team was professional, efficient, and the siding looks fantastic. They even cleaned up everything thoroughly. We highly recommend them!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: We had some storm damage to our fiber cement siding. Old Town Siding Co. came out quickly and did a great job repairing the damaged sections. The repairs are seamless, and you can't even tell there was ever any damage.

reviews.name: Jessica L.
reviews.text: From the initial consultation to the final inspection, the team at Old Town Siding Co. was a pleasure to work with. They installed fiber cement siding on our home, and it looks amazing. We get compliments on it all the time. Worth the investment!

reviews.name: Robert B.
reviews.text: Old Town Siding Co. repaired some damaged soffit and fascia on our home. They were prompt, professional, and the price was very fair. We'll definitely use them again for any future siding needs.

reviews.name: Emily S.
reviews.text: We had our old wood siding replaced with vinyl siding by Old Town Siding Co. The process was smooth, and the crew was very respectful of our property. We're happy with the new look and the added protection.

reviews.name: Michael P.
reviews.text: The trim work done by Old Town Siding Co. really elevated the look of our home. They paid attention to every detail and the results are outstanding. Professional, reliable, and great value.
